description: FP #1 — non-exported internal library wrapper. `async function apiFetch(url, options) { return fetch(url, options); }` is called from exported apiGet/apiPost but itself is non-exported. Z4 Day-1 heuristic gated on `export` keyword — this wrapper is missed. SSRF risk materialises at consumer call site (caught by taint-analyzer), not at the wrapper itself. Must NOT emit after FP #1 fix widens the wrapper-heuristic regex.
